---
title: "gsoc2026-gfpop-blog"
subtitle: "Contribution log & tutorials for the gfpop R package"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Posts documenting my [Google Summer of Code 2026](https://summerofcode.withgoogle.com/)
work on [**gfpop**](https://github.com/vrunge/gfpop). It is graph-constrained change-point
detection in R. Each contribution post links the upstream pull request it describes.
